Motion To Remove Case From Arbitration Hearing List; Declaration ; P/A
MINI MINUTES: John F. Vannucci, Esq., appearing for plaintiff and moving party.
Plaintiff's Motion to Remove Case from Arbitration is heard today. No appearance by the opposing party. Court ordered Motion Granted. Case is removed from Arbitration. Trial Date of 6/24/2002 at 9:30 AM, in department 206 is ordered set. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and to give notice of the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Case to be ordered to the Early Settlement Program. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Patricia M. Evezich. (212)
